basics.name: Luiz Rodrigo Martins Barbosa
basics.label: Staff iOS Engineer · Functional Programming · Architecture · OSS
basics.summary: Engineer with 23+ years across FinTech, MedTech, audio and marketplace apps. Grounded in functional programming and applied category theory, and applies these principles pragmatically to produce testable, maintainable and near-zero-defect code. Prolific open-source contributor, with libraries spanning reactive programming, hardware protocols and functional abstractions. Track record of setting technical direction across teams, mentoring engineers and hiring. An intentional foray into engineering management confirmed that technical leadership — setting architectural direction, raising the quality bar and multiplying the impact of other engineers — is where the greatest leverage lies. Streamlined the full development cycle through LLM agents and deterministic code generators — from requirements to production-ready code, tests and pull requests.

work.summary: FinTech platform for automated savings and AI-driven investing, with a focus on subscription revenue growth

highlights: Feature development in the Subscriptions squad — the company's primary revenue driver — contributing to £10.46M ARR and ~180K invoiced subscribers by end of 2025

Delivered the Feature Engine and New Tiers architecture: a fully dynamic, backend-driven subscription system that cut new-tier time-to-market from 2.5 months to 10 days, drove a £120K ARR uplift in the UK and +£17K MRR in the EU with a 10% free-trial conversion uplift

Shipped Upsell v3 (+4% free-trial conversions), Perks (dynamic Max-tier benefits), Rebranding, Travel Insurance (backend-driven, multi-iteration) and France launch in a single cycle; backend-driven/BFF patterns introduced in the squad subsequently adopted by most of the other squads
Championed functional programming across the iOS codebase: pure reducers, declarative UI, side-effect isolation and reactive pipelines — improving testability and all but eliminating regression bugs

Built Claude Code agentic workflows that automate the full feature delivery cycle — reading requirements from Notion, validating designs in Figma, generating all code layers with tests as stacked PRs, and tracking progress back to Jira with subtasks and AC; adopted across the whole iOS team

Operated as the de facto technical authority in a flat iOS org with no Staff role — authored RFCs and tech design documents adopted across squads, and served as the primary architectural reference for a team of ~10 engineers
Mentoring engineers and sharing expertise through internal talks on iOS architecture, functional programming and TDD

work.summary: British MedTech company building Software as a Medical Device (SaMD) for remote patient monitoring

highlights: Technical leadership of 11 iOS engineers across multiple time zones — architectural reviews, coding standards and mentoring
Drove modularisation to enforce ownership boundaries and cut build times
Strengthened testing practices in compliance with SaMD regulatory requirements
Departed after a short period — the organisation's leadership culture had fundamental problems and did not meet baseline professional standards

work.summary: German multinational online food, grocery and goods delivery service

highlights: Managed nine engineers (Android, iOS, backend) across the Riders app domain, balancing delivery pace with technical health and individual growth
Full EM cycle: performance reviews, growth conversations, OKR tracking, roadmap planning, interviewing and onboarding

Code and architecture reviews across Swift, Kotlin, Go and Ruby — native mobile apps and AWS-hosted backend services (SNS, SQS, EC2, S3 and Lambda) with infrastructure managed via Kubernetes and Terraform
RFC/PRD authoring and review, feature design, technical grooming and cross-team dependency management
Contributions to the iOS platform guild and close collaboration with the iOS and Android staff engineers

work.summary: Traditional German loudspeaker brand offering high-quality consumer audio products controlled via companion apps

highlights: Technical leadership of four engineers — code reviews, pair programming, technical and career mentoring, hiring, onboarding; built team processes for knowledge exchange, retrospectives and motivation that became a model for the wider organisation

Architected all new iOS apps on a purely functional core: immutable state, complete side-effect isolation, declarative SwiftUI/Combine views and Redux reducers; enforced TDD across the team — delivered consistently on schedule with near-zero production crashes

Established cross-functional processes between Product Design and Engineering from the ground up — coached hardware designers on agile practices, Apple HIG and platform constraints; shaped the firmware communication contracts and protocols governing all app–device interaction

Hardware integration with audio suppliers over Bluetooth/Bonjour/WAMP protocols; close collaboration with POs, PMs and UX/UI to shape new products; led research initiatives to validate feasibility and track emerging platform trends

Co-initiated the Teufel Headphones companion app as an engineering-driven prototype (alongside Android), pitched it to leadership, and delivered it from scratch in under two months — the app turned the headphones line into a significant revenue source during the industry-wide supply chain shortage

Built developer tooling to automate the full development workflow (Lokalise, Zeplin, snapshot testing, CI/CD); introduced an open-source culture that produced widely reused GitHub libraries and became a hiring differentiator

work.summary: Platform for free, easy and local trades of goods and services — one of Germany's most-used apps

highlights: Feature development on one of Germany's top-ranked apps, serving millions of daily users across a large-scale classifieds marketplace
Adopted RxSwift and MVVM to decouple and modernise legacy Objective-C code, building new Swift features with unit tests from day one
Contributed to architectural discussions and code reviews, improving consistency and testability across a large shared codebase

work.summary: Map and routing company providing foundations for autonomous driving and urban mobility

highlights: Designed and maintained iOS CI-as-code release pipelines (JobDSL, Groovy, Ruby/Rake) for HERE WeGo — a globally distributed navigation app with a vast user base
iOS feature development (Objective-C) and delivery of a white-label HERE WeGo variant for automotive OEM partners, coordinating integration requirements across teams

work.summary: Internet-TV-as-a-Service platform for network operators, handling encoding, CMS, EPG and player delivery

highlights: Co-led the Platforms team; built iOS, web and SmartTV components (Obj-C, C#, JS) for Telenor MyTV, SKY Online and Telefónica

work.summary: Marketing agency pioneer in loyalty and incentive programs in Brazil

highlights: Full-stack development and batch integration APIs for Ticket Frete (C#, ASP.NET, SQL Server), a freight platform processing ~30k transactions/month

work.summary: System integrator focused on advanced technology solutions, Cisco Gold Partner in Brazil

highlights: Architect and developer for iOS, PocketPC, embedded and web platforms (C#, Java, Objective-C, C++); R&D prototypes and MVPs for enterprise clients including Braskem, Danone and Sirio-Libanês Hospital
Maintenance and development of Liberty Affinity (ASP.NET, SOAP, Oracle)

work.summary: Brazilian company specialised in agricultural and livestock data management software

highlights: Technical leadership, CI automation and agile process improvements for agricultural ERP products (VB, C#, PocketPC)
Desktop, web and mobile development (VB, C#, PocketPC, Palm OS)

skills.name: AI & Agentic Development
keywords: End-to-end feature delivery automation (requirements → code → PRs → Jira)

projects.name: FP
projects.description: Comprehensive functional programming library for Swift (iOS, macOS, Linux) — covers functors, applicatives, monads, algebraic types and more; documentation written to teach FP to developers of all levels

projects.name: NetworkTools
projects.description: FP and dependency-injection approach to HTTP client/server communication in Swift — composable request pipelines, JSON decoding and server utilities

projects.name: SwiftRex
projects.description: Open-source unidirectional dataflow (Redux) library for SwiftUI and UIKit, powered by Combine, RxSwift or ReactiveSwift — currently being rewritten

projects.name: FP at Teufel — CocoaHeads Berlin
projects.description: Talk on applying functional programming in production iOS apps; slides and Swift Playgrounds available

projects.name: Other personal repositories
projects.description: CombineWebSocket, CombineNFC, FunctionalParser and many other projects

projects.name: Teufel repositories
projects.description: FoundationExtensions, UIExtensions and Combine wrappers for Bonjour, WAMP, LongPolling, CoreBluetooth and EAP async protocols
